title: Biranchinarayan Temple, Buguda
tagline: Biranchinarayan Temple, Buguda — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: The Biranchi Narayan Sun Temple, also known as the Abode of Viranchinarayana or the Wooden Konark, is a Hindu Temple located in the town of Buguda in Ganjam, Odisha.
overview.description: The Biranchi Narayan Sun Temple, also known as the Abode of Viranchinarayana or the Wooden Konark, is a Hindu Temple located in the town of Buguda in Ganjam, Odisha. It is the second Surya temple constructed in Odisha, after the famous Konark Sun Temple.

topPlaces.name: Buguda
topPlaces.description: Buguda is a town in the Ghumusara area of Ganjam district in the state of Odisha, India. Buguda is approximately 70 kilometres from Berhampur, a major city in Odisha.

topPlaces.name: Budhakhol
topPlaces.description: Budhakhol is a heritage site of Odisha located in Buguda block of Ganjam District in Odisha, India. It is located about 92 km away from the district headquarters.

topPlaces.name: Golia, Ganjam
topPlaces.description: Golia is a village located in the Ganjam District of the Indian state of Odisha. It is governed by a panchayat, which also governs several nearby villages.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Biranchinarayan Temple, Buguda?
faq.a: The best time to visit Biranchinarayan Temple, Buguda is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Biranchinarayan Temple, Buguda?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (117 km) and the nearest railway station is Puri Railway Station (108 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Biranchinarayan Temple, Buguda?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Biranchinarayan Temple, Buguda at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Biranchinarayan Temple, Buguda?
faq.a: Stays in Biranchinarayan Temple, Buguda start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Biranchinarayan Temple, Buguda?
faq.a: The top attractions are Buguda, Budhakhol, Golia, Ganjam.
